_note: Rough buildout from mattfryed.com/65porter. Copy, credits, and recognition links are Matt's own; images referenced by URL from his Squarespace CDN (swap later). Node geometry + colours match the live homepage roster (P-05). Sample-grade pending Matt's review.
name: 65 PORTER

hero.alt: 65 Porter — exterior of the converted warehouse offices

intro.title: CLASSIFICATION
intro.body:
Relocating to expand the agency's capacity — only a few blocks away, still in Bushwick — I oversaw the next phase of the office design in a 21,000 sq ft raw warehouse space.

Office space design, 2019–2021. Conceptual, interior, architectural design, fabrication management, and art.

intro.title: RECOGNITION
intro.body: Featured in Workdesign Magazine. ID Magazine Best of Year 2023 — Small Creative Office honoree. A walkable 3D Matterport tour of the space is available.

nodes.label: Architectural Design
nodes.blurb: Converting 21,000 sq ft of raw warehouse into a working creative agency.

blocks.title: PRIOR TO PRINCIPAL CONSTRUCTION
blocks.body: The starting condition — a raw Bushwick warehouse shell, before principal construction.

nodes.label: Interior Design
nodes.blurb: Conference rooms, front desk, and the day-to-day spaces of the agency.

nodes.label: Environmental Signage
nodes.blurb: Wayfinding and identity built into the space.

nodes.label: Furniture Design & Fabrication
nodes.blurb: Bespoke pieces fabricated for the offices.
